name: Khan Skewer Restaurant
tagline: Xinjiang-style lamb skewers heavy on cumin and charcoal — the only spot on Oahu doing this regional Chinese BBQ right.
mustOrder: lamb skewers — cumin-crusted, charcoal-grilled, the signature
cold dishes — cucumber salad, wood ear mushroom
parking: Street parking on Isenberg St; side streets toward University
talkStory: One of the most genuinely local spots on this map. Isenberg Street near UH has zero tourist foot traffic — the clientele is overwhelmingly local Asian community who know exactly what Xinjiang BBQ should taste like. The lamb skewers are cumin-heavy and charcoal-grilled in the authentic Northwest Chinese style. Nobody else on Oahu fills this niche. Open for dinner, closed Tuesdays.
